gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرفوع - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (16/179)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرفوع - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (16/179)
text: قَالَ أَمِيرُ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ صَلَوَاتُ اللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ فِي بَعْضِ خُطَبِهِ إِنَّ أَفْضَلَ الْفِعَالِ صِيَانَةُ الْعِرْضِ بِالْمَالِ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Ali, from Moama, raising it, said,
‘Amir Al-Momineen<sup>asws</sup> said in one of his<sup>asws</sup> sermons: ‘The most superior deed is maintaining the dignity with the wealth’.
en.sarwar: 14. Muhammad ibn Ali has narrated from Mu’ammar in a marfu‘ manner from ’Amir al-Mu’minin, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, who has said the following: “In one of his speeches, ’Amir al-Mu’minin, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘The best deed is protecting one’s dignity by means of wealth.’”
